title: Taczgun_R_WhiteSun
description:
Taczgun_R_WhiteSun — 47 weapons for Spigot 1.20.1
Port of the TACZ mod for Spigot with no client mods required. 47 guns with original models, sounds, headshots and ammo system. Installation: JAR into plugins → done.
body:
Tacz_R_WhiteSun — 47 weapons for Spigot 1.20.1
Standalone port of 47 firearms from the TACZ mod (Timeless and Classics Zero) for pure Spigot/Paper servers. No client mods required — resource pack only.

⚠️ Resource Pack Required
Download the resource pack here:
https://download.mc-packs.net/pack/af9ea93246d0157535b4605ccddcbe78cd7dc24e.zip
Paste the link into plugins/Taczgun_R_WhiteSun/config.yml → resource-pack.url

🔫 Weapons
47 weapons from TACZ mod with original 3D models and sounds:
Pistols — Glock 17, M1911, P320, Desert Eagle, Desert Eagle Golden, CZ75, Timeless 50, B93R, Uzi
SMG — HK MP5A5, P90, UMP45, Vector 45
Assault Rifles — AK-47, M4A1, AUG, SCAR-L, SCAR-H, HK416D, HK416A5, G36K, M16A1, M16A4, QBZ-95, QBZ-191, Type-81, FN FAL, HK G3, SKS Tactical, MK14
LMG — M249, FN Evolys, RPK, Minigun
Shotguns — M870, AA12, SPAS-12, M1014, DB Long, DB Short
Snipers — M700, AI AWP, M107, M95, Springfield 1873, SPR15HB
Launchers — RPG-7, M320
⚙️ Mechanics
Shooting:
Hitscan system — instant raycast, no projectile arrows
Armor penetration, headshot multiplier (×1.5–2.0)
Hit markers: white on hit, gold on headshot, red on kill
Bullet tracers colored by weapon type
Auto, semi-auto, burst — switchable fire modes
Bullet Physics:
Bullets pass through leaves, grass, flowers
Bullets pass through glass (glass breaks)
Bullets pass through cobwebs (with pierce loss)
Ice breaks — regular and frosted ice turns to water, packed and blue ice disappears
Launchers can destroy blocks (configurable)
Ammo System:
21 ammo types with original TACZ textures
Physical ammo required in inventory to shoot
Creative mode — ammo is not consumed
Weapon Modules:
Extended magazines I/II/III (standard, light for LMGs, sniper, shotgun)
Ammo modules: FMJ (+pierce), HE (explosive), HP (+damage), Incendiary, Slug (shotguns only)
Installed via weapon settings menu

🛒 Crafting System
Weapons, ammo and modules are purchased for materials (iron ingots, copper ingots, gold ingots, diamonds, redstone). Prices are configured in individual YAML files per item. Crafting can be disabled per weapon or made free for OPs.

📦 GUI Menu /gun menu
Clean menu with 4 sections:
Weapons — full catalog with stats and prices, buy for resources
Ammo — all ammo types, one-click purchase
Magazines / Modules — extended mags and ammo modules
Weapon Settings — switch fire mode, install/remove module

📋 Requirements
Server: Spigot / Paper 1.20.1
Java: 17+
Client: Minecraft Java 1.20.1 + resource pack (sent automatically)
Port: 8765 (TCP) for built-in resource pack HTTP server

🔧 Installation
Drop the JAR into plugins/
Start the server
Open port 8765 in your firewall
Paste resource pack URL into config.yml → resource-pack.url
Resource pack is sent to players automatically on join
All models, textures and sounds are taken from the TACZ mod (Timeless and Classics Zero). This plugin is not an official product of the TACZ team.
